DATA: OSINT · ACLED · ISW · LIVEUAMAP · WAR ON THE ROCKS · MWI · IWI · THE GREEN NOTEBOOK · MARINETRAFFIC · WIKIPEDIA FOR EDUCATIONAL / RESEARCH USE ONLY · NOT OFFICIAL INTELLIGENCE TOC MONKEY v0.5
// WTF IS THIS?

This is a personal ops dashboard — most of the data is pulled from open-source intel feeds. I built it so I could stop tabbing between a dozen sites just to get a basic picture of what’s going on.

One place. Fast assessment. No noise.

WHAT YOU’RE LOOKING AT
MAPActive conflict zones by COCOM. Markers are color-coded by intensity. Click any zone for details.
OSINT / RSSLive feed aggregating open-source analysts, verified accounts, and journal RSS feeds filtered to the active AOR.
EQUIPMENT INDEXNotable platforms operating in the AOR — rotates through documented systems with origin and role tags.
TASK ORGUnclassified order of battle. US/NATO, partner nations, and adversary force structure for the selected command.
SITREPAI-generated situation report built from the live feed. Fires on tab switch. Not official intel — for orientation only.
CHIEF’S PICKSCurated reading list by COCOM. Analysts, journals, and perspectives I trust — rotates when you switch commands.
DATA SOURCES

Bluesky OSINT accounts · War on the Rocks · Irregular Warfare Initiative · FPRI · RAND · ISW · ACLED · CrisisWatch · EIA · metals-api · MarineTraffic · Alpha Vantage. All open-source.

FEEDBACK & SOURCES

Got a source worth adding, an analyst I’m missing, or an article recommendation? Use the RECOMMEND AN ARTICLE button in Chief’s Picks or the submission page. Always open to improving the feed.

AI-GENERATED SITREP  ·  OPEN SOURCE DATA ONLY  ·  NOT OFFICIAL INTELLIGENCE  ·  FOR EDUCATIONAL USE

WHAT'S CHIEF TRACKING?

A dashboard I built because I got tired of having 47 tabs open. Most of it's open-source — OSINT feeds, RSS, live data. Starting point, not gospel.

Bad sources, missing sources, wrong map — tell me. Recommend something worth reading.

AATW — TOC NERD 🐒
